description: Execute SQL against the configured database

state.sql: SELECT r.region_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN regions r ON o.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-03-31' AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.region_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
